previewCss: .darma-loader-open-cube-grid{display:inline-grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,16px);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,16px);gap:4px}.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i{display:block;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:4px;background:var(--loader-color,#16a34a);animation:darma-loader-open-cube-grid-pulse var(--loader-speed,1.3s) ease-in-out infinite}.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(2),.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.1s}.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(3),.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(5),.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(7){animation-delay:.2s;background:var(--loader-secondary-color,#86efac)}.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(6),.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(8){animation-delay:.3s}.darma-loader-open-cube-grid i:nth-child(9){animation-delay:.4s}@keyframes darma-loader-open-cube-grid-pulse{0%,70%,100%{transform:scale(.72);opacity:.42}35%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}

name: Open Radar Sweep
searchText: open-radar-sweep open radar sweep creative open-source open-pack-2026 radar sweep scan html css react cssonly customizable popular
previewCss: .darma-loader-open-radar-sweep{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:72px;height:72px;border:2px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 42%,transparent);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 16%,transparent) 0 2px,transparent 3px),radial-gradient(circle,transparent 45%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 15%,transparent) 46% 48%,transparent 49%);overflow:hidden}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep:before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,color-mix(in srgb,var(--loader-color,#10b981) 70%,transparent),transparent 42%);animation:darma-loader-open-radar-sweep-spin var(--loader-speed,1.8s) linear infinite}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i{position:absolute;width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--loader-color,#10b981);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--loader-color,#10b981)}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i:nth-child(1){left:21px;top:24px}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i:nth-child(2){left:48px;top:36px}.darma-loader-open-radar-sweep i:nth-child(3){left:32px;top:52px}@keyframes darma-loader-open-radar-sweep-spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}

<svg class="darma-loader-uiverse-circuit-signal-path darma-loader-uiverse-circuit-signal-path__circuit" viewBox="0 0 80 60" width="80" height="60">
  <path
    d="M8,30 H22 V12 H58 V30 H72 M58,30 V48 H22 V30"
    fill="none"
    stroke="#2DD4BF"
    stroke-width="1.5"
    stroke-linecap="round"
    stroke-linejoin="round"
    opacity="0.18"
  ></path>

<path
class="darma-loader-uiverse-circuit-signal-path__trace"
d="M8,30 H22 V12 H58 V30 H72 M58,30 V48 H22 V30"
fill="none"
stroke="#2DD4BF"
stroke-width="1.5"
stroke-linecap="round"
stroke-linejoin="round"

> </path>

  <circle r="3.5" fill="#FFD93D">
    <animateMotion dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite">
      <mpath href="#guide"></mpath>
    </animateMotion>
  </circle>

<path
id="guide"
d="M8,30 H22 V12 H58 V30 H72 M58,30 V48 H22 V30"
fill="none"

> </path>

<circle cx="22" cy="12" r="2.5" fill="#2DD4BF" opacity="0.55"></circle>
<circle cx="58" cy="12" r="2.5" fill="#2DD4BF" opacity="0.55"></circle>
<circle cx="22" cy="48" r="2.5" fill="#2DD4BF" opacity="0.55"></circle>
<circle cx="58" cy="48" r="2.5" fill="#2DD4BF" opacity="0.55"></circle>
</svg>

previewCss: .darma-loader-open-folding-cube{position:relative;display:inline-block;width:58px;height:58px;transform:rotate(45deg)}.darma-loader-open-folding-cube i{position:absolute;width:50%;height:50%;background:var(--loader-color,#0f766e);transform-origin:100% 100%;animation:darma-loader-open-folding-cube-fold var(--loader-speed,1.55s) infinite linear both}.darma-loader-open-folding-cube i:nth-child(2){left:50%;transform-origin:0 100%;animation-delay:.2s;background:var(--loader-secondary-color,#5eead4)}.darma-loader-open-folding-cube i:nth-child(3){left:50%;top:50%;transform-origin:0 0;animation-delay:.4s}.darma-loader-open-folding-cube i:nth-child(4){top:50%;transform-origin:100% 0;animation-delay:.6s;background:var(--loader-secondary-color,#5eead4)}@keyframes darma-loader-open-folding-cube-fold{0%,10%{transform:perspective(110px) rotateX(-180deg);opacity:0}25%,75%{transform:perspective(110px) rotateX(0);opacity:1}90%,100%{transform:perspective(110px) rotateY(180deg);opacity:0}}

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" height="200" width="200" viewBox="0 0 200 200" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil">
	<defs>
		<clipPath id="darma-loader-darma-custom-666-pencil-eraser">
			<rect height="30" width="30" ry="5" rx="5"></rect>
		</clipPath>
	</defs>
	<circle transform="rotate(-113,100,100)" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-dashoffset="439.82" stroke-dasharray="439.82 439.82" stroke-width="2" stroke="currentColor" fill="none" r="70" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__stroke"></circle>
	<g transform="translate(100,100)" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__rotate">
		<g fill="none">
			<circle transform="rotate(-90)" stroke-dashoffset="402" stroke-dasharray="402.12 402.12" stroke-width="30" stroke="var(--loader-color, #2563eb)" r="64" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__body1"></circle>
			<circle transform="rotate(-90)" stroke-dashoffset="465" stroke-dasharray="464.96 464.96" stroke-width="10" stroke="var(--loader-secondary-color, #60a5fa)" r="74" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__body2"></circle>
			<circle transform="rotate(-90)" stroke-dashoffset="339" stroke-dasharray="339.29 339.29" stroke-width="10" stroke="color-mix(in srgb, var(--loader-color, #2563eb) 80%, #000000)" r="54" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__body3"></circle>
		</g>
		<g transform="rotate(-90) translate(49,0)" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__eraser">
			<g class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__eraser-skew">
				<rect height="30" width="30" ry="5" rx="5" fill="color-mix(in srgb, var(--loader-secondary-color, #60a5fa) 75%, white)"></rect>
				<rect clip-path="url(#darma-loader-darma-custom-666-pencil-eraser)" height="30" width="5" fill="var(--loader-secondary-color, #60a5fa)"></rect>
				<rect height="20" width="30" fill="hsl(223,10%,90%)"></rect>
				<rect height="20" width="15" fill="hsl(223,10%,70%)"></rect>
				<rect height="20" width="5" fill="hsl(223,10%,80%)"></rect>
				<rect height="2" width="30" y="6" fill="hsla(223,10%,10%,0.2)"></rect>
				<rect height="2" width="30" y="13" fill="hsla(223,10%,10%,0.2)"></rect>
			</g>
		</g>
		<g transform="rotate(-90) translate(49,-30)" class="darma-loader-darma-custom-666__pencil__point">
			<polygon points="15 0,30 30,0 30" fill="hsl(33,90%,70%)"></polygon>
			<polygon points="15 0,6 30,0 30" fill="hsl(33,90%,50%)"></polygon>
			<polygon points="15 0,20 10,10 10" fill="hsl(223,10%,10%)"></polygon>
		</g>
	</g>
</svg>
